top.name: Artificer's Magnum Opus
top.rules_text: Deploy the Arcanomechanical Colossus on target tile (40HP 13DMG 2SPD Range 3). Mobile. Each turn it auto-attacks nearest enemy AND deploys a free Drone adjacent. All your other constructs within 3 gain +2 to all stats. If destroyed deals 14 damage to all enemies within 2.

channel.name: Artificer's Magnum Opus (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Colossus enters with Sympathy Link to you (shared damage split evenly) and +5HP

bottom.name: Elodin's Fury
bottom.rules_text: All your constructs simultaneously fire at all enemies in their range. Each construct deals its full damage to every enemy it can target. Constructs cannot act next turn.

channel.name: Elodin's Fury (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Constructs can still act next turn
